_comment: Named drops of vendor samples. Add ONE entry per batch as new files arrive — never copy triage_batch.py. Run: python scripts/triage_batch.py --batch <name>. Folders are resolved relative to data_root (relative to the Python-Service-UI dir); absolute paths are also accepted.
